From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

**St. Benedict's Church** or **St. Benedict's Catholic Church** or variations thereof may refer to:

## Denmark

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=St._Benedict%27s_Church&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Denmark")]

* [St. Bendt's Church, Ringsted](/wiki/St._Bendt%27s_Church,_Ringsted "St. Bendt's Church, Ringsted")

## Germany

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=St._Benedict%27s_Church&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Germany")]

## New Zealand

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=St._Benedict%27s_Church&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: New Zealand")]

## Hong Kong

## United Kingdom
